basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Consultant Psychiatrist/ Assistant Professor Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal) Consultant Psychiatrist/Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of AIIMS Bhopal. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Bhopal Consultant Psychiatrist/Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: All Posts: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation is admissible in respect of SC/ST/OBC candidates in accordance with the instructions issued by the Central Government from time to time.

qualification.education_qualification: A post graduate Psychiatry qualification e.g., MD/ DNB/Diploma
qualification.details: Consultant Psychiatrist/Assistant professor: Essential: A post graduate Psychiatry qualification e.g., MD/ DNB/Diploma. Experience: Three years’ experience in a recognized institution in the Psychiatry after obtaining the qualifying degree of MD or qualification recognized equivalent thereto. Desirable: Experience in mental healthcare delivery and counselling. Psychiatrist/Senior Resident: Essential: A post graduate Psychiatry qualification e.g., MD/ DNB/Diploma. Desirable: 1. Clinical and/or research Experience in Telemedicine and/or Tele-training 2. Experience of working with multidisciplinary research teams 3. Indexed scientific publications.

salary_details.details: Consultant Psychiatrist/Assistant professor: Rs. 1,50,000/ Month (Fixed) Psychiatrist/Senior Resident: Rs. 1,00,000/ Month (Fixed)

selection_process: Interview or Written test as applicable

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 12 June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant Psychiatrist/Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Consultant Psychiatrist/Assistant Professor post in the AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Psychiatrist/Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The essential educational qualification for the Psychiatrist/Senior Resident post is a post-graduate Psychiatry qualification, such as MD, DNB, or Diploma.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the posts announced by AIIMS Bhopal?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts announced by AIIMS Bhopal is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Consultant Psychiatrist/Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Consultant Psychiatrist/Assistant Professor position is Rs. 1,50,000 per month (Fixed).

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Psychiatrist/Senior Resident position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Psychiatrist/Senior Resident position is Rs. 1,00,000 per month (Fixed).

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 will be based on an interview or a written test, as applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, 462020.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.
